entity.summary: European centralized cryptocurrency exchange originally launched in 2018 and later operated as a consumer-facing crypto trading platform under the Blocktrade brand. Current exchange and company materials continue to present Blocktrade as an operating service, so HEI classifies it as active.
entity.notes: Launch date uses the 2018 public exchange-launch marker. Later corporate restructuring and regional operating details are not modeled as a separate successor entity in this batch.

events.title: Blocktrade launched its crypto-asset exchange
events.description: Blocktrade publicly launched a crypto-asset exchange in Europe in August 2018.
events.notes: Public launch marker reconstructed from contemporaneous launch reporting and current exchange profiles.

evidence.title: Blocktrade.com launches exchange for crypto assets
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous launch coverage for the Blocktrade exchange.

evidence.title: Blocktrade exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile preserves the Blocktrade exchange identity and current operating context.
